data.title: Neinor Homes reiterates 2026–27 guidance backed by strong visibility, resilient margins and robust housing market fundamentals
data.description: During its Annual General Meeting, Neinor Homes, the prominent residential developer in Spain, reaffirmed its guidance for the years 2026-2027.

data.title: CACI Schedules Fiscal Year 2026 Third Quarter Conference Call
data.description: RESTON, Va.--CACI International Inc (NYSE: CACI) is set to announce its financial results for the third quarter of fiscal year 2026 post-market close on Wednesday, April 22. A conference call has been scheduled for the following day, April 23 at 8:00 a.m. Eastern time, where key executives will delve into the quarterly performance, followed by a Q&A session. Interested parties can tune in to the call and access relevant materials on CACI’s Investor Relations platform.

data.title: Tervis LLC Announces Acquisition of Symglass
data.description: Tervis, a well-known drinkware company established in 1946 and currently owned by Tervis LLC, revealed its recent purchase of Symglass, a drinkware company based in Nashville. Symglass specializes in creating durable glass products known for their clarity and resistance to breaking. Their product lineup consists of items such as stemless wine glasses, beer pint glasses, champagne glasses, and other unbreakable drinkware suitable for both indoor and outdoor gatherings. This acquisition marks a significant move for Tervis as it expands its product offerings and market presence in the drinkware industry.

data.title: Salt Security Research: As AI Agents Outpace Security, Most Organizations Face an Unsecured API Surge
data.description: A recent report on the State of AI and API Security discovered that around 50% of organizations have postponed AI implementations as a result of worries about API security. Moreover, almost all cyber attacks are now traced back to authenticated sources, marking a significant shift in cybersecurity threats. The findings were outlined in a report released from Palo Alto, California on April 8, 2026 by Salt Security, a prominent company specializing in API security.

data.title: Pasqal Partners with True Nexus to Apply Quantum Computing to Next-Generation Food Protein Design
data.description: Today, Pasqal, a top player in neutral-atom quantum computing, revealed a key partnership with True Nexus, a company specializing in computational intelligence to enable programmable protein functionality in practical food uses. The collaboration comes as Pasqal gears up to become a publicly traded company by merging with Bleichroeder Acquisition Corp. II (Nasdaq: BBCQ). This teamwork aims to leverage Pasqal’s quantum computing capabilities in revolutionizing food-related applications.

data.title: Empyrean Solutions Launches Empyrean CECL™, Giving Banks and Credit Unions a Faster, Simpler Path to Quarterly Compliance
data.description: Empyrean Solutions, a reputable provider of risk and performance solutions, has recently introduced a new system. This innovative solution offers audit-ready Expected Credit Loss results with operational efficiency, complete transparency, and analytical rigor. It is designed to be scalable across institutions of all sizes. This development was announced in Woburn, Mass., on April 8, 2026. The solution aims to enhance the credit assessment process, ensuring accuracy and reliability.

data.title: Infra Pipes Acquires HDPE Business of Atkore to Strengthen Manufacturing and Distribution Capabilities
data.description: A manufacturer based in Mississauga, Ontario, Infra Pipes, specializing in medium- and high-density polyethylene pipelines, has successfully acquired Atkore Inc.’s HDPE business serving the telecommunications sector. This strategic move aims to bolster the Company's manufacturing and distribution capacities and enhance its customer service reach throughout North America. The completion of this acquisition marks a significant step in the Company's efforts to fortify its market presence with a focus on key customer segments.

data.title: Cognito Therapeutics Partners with Initiative to Change the “D-Word,” Commits to Eliminating Use of “Dementia” Across All Communications
data.description: A partnership has been established between Cognito Therapeutics and an initiative aimed at altering the way Alzheimer's disease is discussed, with a focus on eliminating the use of the term "Dementia" in all communications. This commitment signifies a significant shift in language use concerning Alzheimer's, signaling a departure from traditional terminology. This development carries potential implications for wider communication strategies within the medical and research fields.

data.title: Agnes Inversiones: They Call It “California of Europe”; Spain's Costa del Sol is ideal destination - not just for retirement
data.description: Situated in Marbella, Spain, the Costa del Sol boasts more than 320 sunny days annually and offers excellent infrastructure, medical facilities, and convenient air travel options. Referred to as the “California of Europe,” this southern Spanish region is renowned for its attractive real estate market. The mild, distinctive microclimate of Marbella, nestled between mountains and sea, guarantees comfortable temperatures, distinguishing it from other areas. With over 320 days of sunshine and a reputation for quality living, Costa del Sol continues to captivate investors and residents alike.

data.title: Dyno Therapeutics Announces Capsid License Exercised by Astellas for Skeletal Muscle-Targeted Gene Delivery, Validating AI-Powered Technology for Biological Sequence Design
data.description: A genetic technologies company in WATERTOWN, Mass., Dyno Therapeutics, Inc., revealed that Astellas Pharma Inc. (TSE: 4503) has opted to license a unique adeno-associated virus (AAV) capsid intended for therapeutic delivery to skeletal muscle. This capsid, engineered through artificial intelligence (AI) technology, is part of their collaborative research effort established in December 2021. This milestone marks the initial capsid licensed from the collaboration, showcasing Dyno's stride in in vivo gene delivery solutions.

data.title: New Research Finds AI Is Now Foundational to Modern Marketing
data.description: In San Jose and San Francisco, NetApp® revealed its involvement in a recent marketing research study led by Callan Consulting, a prominent Silicon Valley marketing consulting firm. The study involved 18 B2B and B2C technology companies and focused on the impact of AI on modern marketing strategies. This signifies a notable transition from initial trials to widespread integration across enterprises. The study sheds light on the State of AI in marketing organizations.

data.title: SambaNova and Intel Announce Blueprint for Heterogeneous Inference: GPUs for Prefill, SambaNova RDUs for Decode, and Intel® Xeon® 6 CPUs for Agentic Tools
data.description: In San Jose, California, SambaNova revealed their enhanced partnership with Intel by introducing a novel heterogeneous hardware solution. This cutting-edge design integrates GPUs for prefill, Intel Xeon® 6 processors serving as both host and "action" CPUs, and SambaNova RDUs for decode functions. The goal is to provide top-tier inference capabilities specifically tailored for highly demanding Agentic AI applications. This advanced solution is set to launch in the second half of 2026, targeting enterprises, cloud providers, and sovereign AI initiatives seeking to run coding agents and other agentic workloads efficiently.
